app.connectionErrorHint: Make sure spacetime start --in-memory is running on port 3000
app.404Title: Oops! Where did we end up?
app.404Desc: This page seems to have vanished into the spacetime void. Let's turn around!

register.tagline: 60 seconds. Multiplication tables. Beat your best.
register.createAccountDesc: Choose a name for your new account and get started right away!
register.restoreDesc: Enter your 12-character permanent recovery key to restore access.
register.restoreTimeout: Timeout waiting for server response — try again
register.restoreError: Key not found — check your 12-character recovery key
register.howToRestore: How would you like to restore your account?
register.footer: Problems are weighted by community difficulty · powered by SpaceTimeDB

register_split.consent_1: I confirm I am a teacher using this for school purposes.
register_split.consent_2: I consent to store my email for account recovery.
register_split.recovery_nag_student: Make sure to copy your Recovery Key! Otherwise you will lose your progress!

lobby.recoveryNag: You have an active classroom — please secure your Account Recovery Key so you don't lose access to your students.
lobby.masteryDesc: Your 1×1 table at a glance — tap any product to see how to think it through.
lobby.progressProfileDesc: View your mastery grid and learning insights.
lobby.friendsDesc: Exchange codes and compete on the leaderboard.
lobby.classesDesc: Connect with your teacher and classmates.

onboarding.card1Body: Solve as many multiplication problems as you can before time runs out!
onboarding.card2Body: Easy = 1 pt · Medium = 2 pts · Hard = 3 pts. Tougher problems score more!
onboarding.card3Body: Start your first 60-second multiplication sprint. Answer as many as you can — your score gets recorded!
onboarding.card3BodyPlacement: Start your 60-second diagnostic sprint. Do your best — we will use this to find your perfect starting level!

sprint.tapPenalty: Not quite right. Take a quick moment...

migration.title: Welcome Back!
migration.body: We've introduced Multiple-Choice questions! Since typing your answers directly is more challenging, it now earns you 3x the points. To keep the leaderboard fair, we've automatically tripled your past score.

results.heading: Session Complete!
results.struggledHint: These will appear more often in your next sprint.
results.masteryDesc: Your cumulative knowledge map across all sessions.

classroom.joinHint: Students scan the QR code or type the code in the lobby.
classroom.showStatsTitle: Your stats are hidden from this class. Click to show.
classroom.hideStatsTitle: Hide your stats from this class.
classroom.hiddenHint: Your stats are hidden from this class's leaderboard and mastery grid.
classroom.leaderboardEmpty: Start sprinting to populate the board!
classroom.liveCaption: Best session score · Live via SpaceTimeDB
classroom.closeHint: Closing the class removes all members from the session.
classroom.printPopupBlocked: Popup blocked — allow popups for this site and try again.
classroom.printNoKeys: No login cards available — some students may not have recovery keys yet.
classroom.studentLoginHint: Scan to log in on any device — no password needed.
classroom.removeMemberDesc: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from this class?

account.recoveryDesc: Save your recovery key to access your account from another device or browser.
account.recoveryKeyDesc: Permanent 12-character key · never expires · store in a password manager.
account.emailKeyDesc: Email your recovery key to yourself so you can restore access on any device.
account.emailKeySent: Recovery key sent — check your inbox.
account.logoutDesc: Logging out removes this device's access. Your scores and username are kept on the server — use your recovery key to sign in again on another device.
account.deleteDesc: Permanently deletes all your scores, sessions, and answers. This cannot be undone.
account.regenerateDesc: Are you sure? Your old recovery key will be permanently invalidated!
account.noReminders: No active reminders. Add one to keep your streak alive!
account.accountTypeDesc: Your current role determines what features are available to you.

unlock.tier1Desc: New problems with 11, 12, 15, 20, 25 are now in your sprint!

classes.emptyHint: Join an existing class or create your own.
classes.upgradePrompt: Upgrade your account to create classrooms
classes.upgradeDesc: Upgrade your account for free to start managing students and running class sprints.
classes.emptyDesc: Join a classroom to compete with classmates, conquer assignments together, and let your teacher guide your learning journey!

extendedTables.title: Extended Tables
extendedTables.desc: Practice ×11–×25 multiplication — available to Master-level players.

scoring.title: Scoring Guide
scoring.howTitle: Points per correct answer = difficulty weight
scoring.howBody: Weights start from research estimates and gradually shift toward community data over 200+ answers per problem:
scoring.digitBonus: Bonus for extended tables: 11× and 12× answers add +0.5 pts. Three-digit results (≥ 100, e.g. 12×9=108) add +1.0 pts.
scoring.calibNote: Research basis: squares (7×7, 8×8) are harder than they look — students confuse them with neighbours. ×4 and ×9 have reliable tricks (double-twice, digit-sum). Bootstrap values inspired by Ashcraft & Christy (1995).

classSprint.alertTitle: Your teacher started a class sprint!
classSprint.gridDesc: Cells answered correctly by at least one member this sprint.
classSprint.noResults: No results yet — sessions still running.
classSprint.modalDesc: Do you want to start a normal practice round or objectively measure the class's current level?
classSprint.diagnosticDesc: Assessment test. Tests all problem types equally to build an unbiased class mastery heatmap.
classSprint.trainingDesc: Adaptive. Adjusts to individual student weaknesses to close targeted gaps. Ideal for daily practice.

tierPicker.cardBody: Choose where you want to begin — you can always adjust later.
tierPicker.adjustBody: Practice easier tables or jump ahead.

tiers.unlockedDesc1: The 3s table is open. Practice 3×1 through 3×10.
tiers.unlockedDesc2: Fives are easy — they always end in 0 or 5.
tiers.unlockedDesc4: Think of 6 as 5+1 — you're over halfway!
tiers.unlockedDesc5: The 7s — the toughest table. Nearly there!
tiers.unlockedDesc7: You know every multiplication from 1 to 10. 🏆

dkt.0: Multiplying by 0 — Anything times zero is always zero.
dkt.1: Multiplying by 1 — Anything times one stays exactly the same.
dkt.2: The 2s (×2) — Just double the other number.
dkt.3: The 5s (×5) — The answer always ends in 0 or 5.
dkt.4: The 9s (×9) — The tens place is always one less than the number.
dkt.5: The 10s (×10) — Just attach a zero to the end.
dkt.6: Square Numbers — Multiplying a number by itself (e.g., 6×6, 8×8).
dkt.7: Swap Rule — Understanding that 4×5 is the same as 5×4.
dkt.8: Hard Core Facts — The trickiest problems like 6×7, 6×8, and 7×8.
dkt.9: Big Tens (×20) — Multiplying by numbers like 20 or 25.
dkt.10: Advanced Basics — Multiplying with numbers above 10 (like 15×8).
dkt.title: Your Learning Profile
dkt.desc: Based on your accuracy, speed, and consistency across all sprints.
dkt.moreDataDesc: Play a few more sprints on your current level so we can analyze your strengths and weaknesses.
dkt.allMasteredDesc: You have mastered all the multipliers on this level. Brilliant work!

insight.developingSpeed: {{kc}} — accurate ({{accuracy}}%) but slow ({{speed}}s avg). Practice for fluency.
insight.developingAccuracy: {{kc}} — fast but only {{accuracy}}% accurate. Slow down and focus.
insight.struggling: {{kc}} — needs work ({{accuracy}}% accuracy). Try the strategy tips below.
insight.untouched: {{kc}} — not yet explored. Start a sprint to unlock!

friends.levelUpDesc: Playing is more fun with friends. Invite someone to see their live progress, cheer them on, and race them on the leaderboards!
friends.inviteHelp: Code expires in 48 hours. Show QR or share code/link.

recovery.ignore: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

teacher.body: Enter this 6-digit code to verify your email and complete your upgrade to a Teacher account.
teacher.ignore: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
